---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or incorrect scanner behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command run (e.g. `llmarmor scan ./src`)
2. Input file or code snippet that triggers the issue (if possible, create a minimal reproducer)
3. Observed output or behaviour

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste the full output if relevant.

## Environment

- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11.4)
- **LLMArmor version:** (run `llmarmor --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Install method:** (e.g. `pip install llmarmor`, source install)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or files that might help diagnose the issue.
